name: coTfsSDOSegmentRequest
title: coTfsSDOSegmentRequest
syntax: long coTfsSDOSegmentRequest( dword ccs, dword cont, dword toggleBit, dword notUsed, byte inValueBuf[], dword valueBufSize );
long coTfsSDOSegmentRequest( dword ccs, dword cont, dword toggleBit, dword notUsed, qword inValue );
description: This function sends a SDO segmented download or SDO segmented upload request/response and awaits the corresponding response. The DS-301 describes the precise protocol and all parameters.

parameters.name: ccs (client command specifier)
parameters.description: 0: download, other values can cause unexpected behavior 3: upload

parameters.name: cont
parameters.description: 0: other segments will follow 1: last segment

parameters.name: toggleBit
parameters.description: Value of the toggle bit (0 or 1, start with 0).

parameters.name: notUsed
parameters.description: Number of bytes that contain no reference data.

parameters.name: inValueBuf[]
parameters.description: Data field for the reference data.

parameters.name: valueBufSize
parameters.description: Buffer size in byte of inValueBuf.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
